message:
bd-3oaig.9: add auto-fit layout mode + auto-scale zoom

LayoutMode::Auto now evaluates 5 spacing candidates (tight/dense/compact/
normal/spacious) and picks the one that best fits the viewport while
minimizing edge crossings and bends. A composite scoring function heavily
penalises overflow beyond viewport bounds.

- Add AutoFitResult struct and compute_auto_fit_spacing() function
- Auto-fit runs during ensure_render_cache when LayoutMode::Auto is active
- Add auto-scale zoom: computes zoom-to-fit factor from bounding box
- 'A' key toggles auto-scale, 'f' (FitToView) enables it
- Surface auto-fit results in side panel (chosen spacing, overflow ratio,
  quality score, candidates tried, auto-zoom percentage)
- Add 6 JSONL nullable telemetry fields for auto-fit metrics
- Update SAMPLE_JSONL fixtures and make_valid_mega_jsonl helper
- Add 12 tests covering auto-fit, auto-scale, determinism, keybindings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
